introSection: Figure of Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schippers van der Ville previously located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A forum thread on CoasterForce about the Figure of Eight

fullText:
Figure of Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schippers van der Ville previously located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK.


 * A forum thread on CoasterForce about the Figure of Eight
